body.title: GREETING_SPACE tree — social register as traversable habit network
body.result: GREETING_SPACE habit tree seeded: root anchor (passive_capture) + 4 leaves — GREETING_MORNING/EVENING (action, 4 variants each), GREETING_PLAYFUL (context_inject → LLM humor, training target), GREETING_STANDARD (5 variants, replaces PROC_GREETING). PROC_GREETING retired to habit_score=0.10. D201 conditions scoring means specific leaves beat standard via conditions_bonus. All in Postgres. Tests 110/110. Probe: 'good aftermorning' → layered humor.
body.description:
Greeting tree first instance of social register trees. GREETING_SPACE root node, branches by context. Each leaf = response habit scored by BG via milieu+TWM. Replaces single PROC_GREETING.

Parked pending Slate 0 DB work (D212) — greeting tree is the benchmark for pipeline readiness.

GENERATIVE MILESTONE NOTE (2026-03-23):
GREETING_PLAYFUL_VARIANT is an honest cloud call for now — humor composition with multi-layered identity-aware references requires LLM. But it is explicitly a training target.

When Igor can generate "the master indulges in humor before even I have had my coffee" (lisp + mock-servility + self-aware absurdity + relationship pitch) WITHOUT LLM — composing from identity nodes + relationship model + self-model — the graph has crossed into generative capability.

Every successful playful response through cloud = training example. Enough examples → graph generates it. Scaffolding comes down.

This generalizes: if the graph can compose humor, it can compose any register Igor has. That's the bulk of eliminating upstream cloud dependency.

Probe criterion: send "good aftermorning" → Igor responds in-register with multi-layered humor in his own voice. Pass = no cloud. Fail = cloud call or flat response.
